meaning: adj.有统治权的,占优势的,支配的adj.[生物] 显性的
examples: Economically, the centre of Spain has lost its dominant role.
Total independence is a dominant thing in our culture.
He suffered from an oppressively dominant mother.
So dominant was music in his life that a promising school record was one day suddenly ruined.
Derry were dominant in all sectors in the opening period, with James Kielt particularly impressive at midfield.
